series_metadata.series_description: Include project applications, fiscal reports, activity reports, on site monitoring reports, correspondence regarding projects and child count data for Title VI-B projects.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain three years, after grant closure. provided audit has been conducted by Auditor of State, the audit report is released, and all discrepancies areresolved. ; Paper: Retain three years, after grant closure. provided audit has been conducted by Auditor of State, the audit report is released, and all discrepancies areresolved., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
